_comment: Demo Delphi market IDs picked during Phase 4 testing on mainnet. Use these for the live demo and for run-duel testing. Captured 2026-04-28.

markets.question: Will there be another $10+ million exploit in Crypto before end of May?
markets.demo_pitch: Binary, near-term, fact-driven. Bull cites recent exploit cadence, bear cites improving audit/insurance practices.

markets.question: US x Iran permanent peace deal by May 31, 2026
markets.demo_pitch: High-disagreement geopolitical binary. Strong bear case anchors the demo.

markets.question: Will daily x402 volume hit $3M in 2026?
markets.demo_pitch: Crypto-native, requires research. Tests the agents' ability to reason about adoption curves.

markets.question: How High Will BTC Get In April
markets.demo_pitch: Multi-outcome (5-way). Stress-tests agent reasoning across non-binary spaces.

markets.question: Will aliens formally introduce themselves in 2026?
markets.demo_pitch: Whimsical, low-stakes — used as a closer if the demo is going long. Bull goes hard, bear keeps it grounded.
